summary: Remove stale unregistered tail command and unused generated helper functions from the Go reference tree.
reason: Dogfood flagged the generated tail command as unregistered and the pagination/envelope helpers as dead code; these paths are not used by the DoorDash live GraphQL/cart command surface and keeping them adds submit noise.
validated_outcome: 2026-05-23: generated-cli go test ./..., go build ./..., go vet ./..., and printing-press publish validate all passed; dogfood now reports no dead functions and all defined commands registered, with only the existing sync-pipeline heuristic warning remaining.
